reasoning: Koren, today's ride focuses on enhancing your lactate clearance and fatigue resistance, crucial for negating the 9.3% power drop in your 5-minute to 20-minute effort. We'll target structured over-unders to build a robust aerobic base, evident from your last ride's average power of 156.4W. This aligns with the 220-235W target on the Alpine Loop, especially preparing for sustained climbs like Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12 minutes over-unders (3min at 242W, 3min at 218W, 3min at 242W, 3min at 218W)

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
